author: iam4x
subject: v2.1.0-beta.4
body: # [2.1.0-beta.4](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v2.1.0-beta.3...v2.1.0-beta.4) (2017-08-08) ### Bug Fixes * **package.json:** include on npm ([35a6970](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/35a6970)) * **release:** add message with yarn usage ([2e5e691](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/2e5e691)) * **release:** check process exit code npm whoami ([481db97](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/481db97))
